footer.copyright: ©2026 PlantBee. A community-driven smart plant monitoring system built for Hive Helsinki.

home.heroSubtitle: Cultivating a greener Hive Helsinki, one leaf at a time
home.heroDescription: Empowering volunteers with ESP32 sensors to keep our plants thriving though precise, collaborative care. Join the smart plant revolution!
home.introDescription: Welcome to PlantBee, a community-driven smart plant monitoring system that ensures our campus plants thrive through collective care. We turn sensor data into real-world action.
home.heartbeatDescription: Volunteering is the heartbeat of our system. While sensors tell us when a plant is thirsty, it's the community members who provide the care that makes the difference. When a plant needs attention, volunteers step in to water, or simply check on the plant's health. This human touch ensures that our plants not only survive but thrive, fostering a strong sense of community and shared responsibility for our green spaces.
home.missionDescription: Combining smart IoT technology with community effort to ensure optimal plant health across our campus. 🐝

cards.monitoringDescription: Utilizing advanced ESP32 IoT sensors for real-time plant health data and moisture tracking.
cards.volunteerDescription: A collaborative effort where volunteers step in when plants need care, fostering a strong community bond.
cards.tasksDescription: Exact water calculations and automated tracking for every leaf, ensuring precise hydration without the guesswork.

welcome.greeting: Welcome, <name>{{name}}</name>, to <brand>PlantBee</brand>! 🌼 Grow something great together.
welcome.rolePrompt: How would you like to participate in PlantBee ecosystem?
welcome.volunteerDescription: Get notified when plants near you need water or attention. Track your impact and climb the campus leaderboard!
welcome.observerDescription: Browse the map and check plant health stats without committing to care tasks. You can still see all data.
welcome.switchHint: Don't worry, you can always switch roles later in your profile settings.

login.title: Log in to your <account>42 account</account> to use <brand>PlantBee</brand> 🌻

leaderboard.pageContent: Every drop counts! Join the effort, stay hydrated, and help our shared greenery thrive.
leaderboard.ctaContent: Every watering task completed earns you points. Visit the task board to see which plants need your attention right now.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using PlantBee, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the application.

sections.heading: Eligibility
sections.content: PlantBee is available exclusively to members of the 42 Network (Hive Helsinki). You must have a valid 42 Intra account to use this service.

sections.heading: User Responsibilities
items: You agree to use PlantBee only for its intended purpose: caring for campus plants.
You must not abuse the task system or falsely complete tasks.
You must not attempt to exploit, hack, or disrupt the service.
You are responsible for your account activity.

sections.heading: Volunteer Tasks
sections.content: Accepting a task means you commit to completing it in a timely manner. If you cannot complete a task, please cancel it so another volunteer can take over.

sections.heading: Account Termination
sections.content: You may delete your account at any time via profile settings. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.content: PlantBee is a student project developed at Hive Helsinki. It is provided as-is without any warranty. We are not liable for any plant damage resulting from system errors or missed tasks.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of PlantBee after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

sections.heading: Prohibited Activities
items: Inject malicious code or scripts into any input field
Probe or exploit security vulnerabilities
Impersonate other users or misrepresent your identity
Submit false or misleading sensor readings
Reverse engineer or attempt to access backend systems
Automate interactions with the platform without authorization

sections.heading: Intellectual Property & User Content
sections.content: You retain ownership of any photos or descriptions you upload. By submitting content, you grant PlantBee a worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and share that content within the application. PlantBee and all its original content are owned by Hive Helsinki students and protected by copyright.

sections.heading: Hardware & Sensor Disclaimers
sections.content: PlantBee relies on ESP32 soil-moisture sensors, which may experience technical failures, connectivity issues, or inaccurate readings. We are not liable for plant damage caused by sensor errors, network outages, or missed watering tasks due to system failures. The system is provided on a best-effort basis for volunteer coordination only.

sections.heading: Third-Party Services
sections.content: PlantBee integrates with the 42 Network OAuth service for authentication. By using PlantBee, you also agree to comply with 42 Network's terms and privacy policies. We are not responsible for any issues arising from 42 Network's services.

sections.heading: Service Modifications & Discontinuation
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue PlantBee or any of its features at any time without notice. We are not liable for any loss or inconvenience caused by service interruptions, modifications, or discontinuation.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, PlantBee and Hive Helsinki are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including loss of data, lost profits, or plant damage.

sections.heading: Who We Are
sections.content: PlantBee is a smart plant monitoring system developed at Hive Helsinki campus. It connects ESP32 soil-moisture sensors to a backend system to help volunteers care for campus plants.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
sections.content: We collect the following personal data when you log in via 42 Network OAuth:
items: Your 42 Intra login name
Your email address
Your 42 profile picture URL
Your volunteer activity (tasks accepted, completed)

sections.heading: How We Use Your Data
items: To authenticate you via 42 OAuth
To display your profile and activity on the leaderboard
To assign and track plant care tasks
To send notifications about plants that need care

sections.heading: Data Storage
sections.content: Your data is stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted within the PlantBee infrastructure. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

sections.heading: Authentication
sections.content: We use 42 Network OAuth2 for authentication. We never store your 42 password. Authentication tokens are stored in secure HttpOnly cookies.

sections.heading: Your Rights
sections.content: You can delete your account at any time from your profile settings. This permanently removes all your personal data from our system.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For any privacy-related questions, contact the PlantBee team at Hive Helsinki.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.content: We use a single HttpOnly cookie to maintain your login session. This cookie expires after 24 hours and cannot be accessed by JavaScript. No tracking or analytics cookies are used.

sections.heading: Data Retention
sections.content: Your data is retained as long as your account exists. When you delete your account, all personal data including your login, email, profile picture, and task history is permanently removed from our database immediately.

sections.heading: Sensor & Environmental Data
sections.content: Beyond personal data, we collect and store sensor readings from ESP32 devices, including:
items: Soil moisture levels and timestamps
Device identifiers and locations
Historical readings for analytics
IP addresses of devices transmitting data
sections.note: This technical data is used to improve watering recommendations and system reliability.

sections.heading: Data Breach Notification
sections.content: In the event of a confirmed security breach affecting your personal data, we will notify all affected users within 72 hours via email and in-app notification. We will provide details about the breach, data affected, and recommended actions.

sections.heading: Age Restrictions & Children's Privacy
sections.content: PlantBee is exclusively for members of the 42 Network (Hive Helsinki), who must be at least 18 years old or the age of majority in their country. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 18. If we discover a user is under 18, their account will be immediately suspended and data deleted.

sections.heading: Policy Changes & Updates
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy at any time. If changes are material, we will notify you via email and in-app notification at least 14 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of PlantBee after the update period constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
